headline: Royal Caribbean (RCL) Opens Seward Terminal As Alaska Push Meets Health Questions
summary: Royal Caribbean Cruises opened its upgraded Seward cruise terminal in Alaska, featuring sustainability measures and new community-focused facilities. The company is highlighting expanded Alaska operations as part of a broader push into the region for upcoming sailing seasons. Royal Caribbean leadership recently addressed the complexity of running large "floating city" vessels amid renewed public health scrutiny and industry-wide outbreak concerns. headline: Citigroup Maintains Buy on Royal Caribbean Group, Raises Price Target to $362
summary: Citigroup  analyst James Hardiman   maintains Royal Caribbean Group (NYSE:RCL) with a Buy and raises the price target from $348 to $362.

headline: ROYAL CARIBBEAN SELECTS COHORT OF LEGENDARY ARTISTS TO BE FEATURED ON LEGEND OF THE SEAS
summary: Today, Royal Caribbean unveiled the next chapter of its Artist Discovery Program with its newest cohort of emerging artists on Legend of the Seas, the ultimate family vacation debuting July 2026 in Europe. This summer, six artists from across the Caribbean and Central America will debut original, destination-inspired artwork throughout the ship, bringing the spirit, color and culture of the region in bold new ways.

headline: Stock Index Futures Muted After Three-Day Rally, FOMC Meeting in Focus
summary: June S&P 500 E-Mini futures (ESM26) are down -0.01%, and June Nasdaq 100 E-Mini futures (NQM26) are up +0.01% this morning, taking a breather after a three-day rally, while investors turn their attention to the first Federal Reserve meeting under Kevin Warsh.

headline: Royal Caribbean and Frontier Shares Skyrocket, What You Need To Know
summary: A number of stocks jumped in the afternoon session after the Trump Administration announced a new peace deal that would lead to the reopening of the Strait of Hormuz, and potentially address the travel sector's most direct cost and the route disruption that had weighed on bookings since the blockade.
